title: lippia cuneifolia var. incisa
intro: Lippia cuneifolia var. incisa is a lesser-known variety of the Lippia cuneifolia plant, also known as the Mexican oregano or incised leaf Mexican oregano. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lippia cuneifolia var. incisa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, essential oil, and tincture, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
